allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: recurse into GP Preferences registry Collection folders

The registry preference parser only read top-level Registry items.
Registry items organized into Collection folders \(sub-folders in
GP Preferences\) were silently skipped. Add Get-RegistryPreferenceItems
helper that recursively walks Collection elements at any nesting depth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: recurse into Collection folders for drive maps/printers, improve HTML report

- Add Get-DriveMapPreferenceItems recursive helper for nested Collection
  folders in GP Preferences drive map settings
- Add Get-PrinterPreferenceItems recursive helper for nested Collection
  folders in GP Preferences printer settings \(SharedPrinter + PortPrinter\)
- Replace inline parsing in Find-DuplicateDriveMaps and
  Find-DuplicatePrinters with recursive helpers
- Fix HTML multi-value fields \(AffectedGPOs, ConflictPaths, UniqueValues,
  Issues\) to render each value on its own line instead of comma-mashed
- Add "Back to top" navigation links after every report section
- Add CSS for .multi-value and .back-to-top styling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: replace anchor links with JavaScript scrollIntoView for Teams compatibility

Fragment anchor links \(#id\) don''t work when HTML reports are opened
through Teams or SharePoint viewer. Replaced all TOC and back-to-top
links with onclick handlers using scrollIntoView\({behavior:''smooth''}\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: revert to plain anchor links, remove JavaScript

The script tag triggered Edge security restrictions on domain
controllers with IE Enhanced Security Configuration, breaking
all navigation. Reverted to pure HTML #anchor links which work
reliably on DCs. Teams users should download the file to use links.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: add back-to-top anchor links to HTML report sections

Add #anchor navigation links after each report section so users
can quickly return to the top of long reports. Uses pure HTML
anchors for maximum compatibility with domain controllers and
restricted browser environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add comprehensive Active Directory audit script

Covers domain overview, DC health/replication, user/group/computer
analysis, password policy \(with NIST 800-63B checks\), privileged
access review, and security findings. Outputs HTML + CSV reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
